value:
I appreciate you reaching out, and I'm sorry to hear you haven't received an update in weeks—that's frustrating when you've already provided everything needed. I'd like to help move this forward right away.

To locate your case and check on its status, could you please confirm your full name and the email address associated with your account? Once I have that, I'll pull up your file and either get you an immediate update or reconnect you with your case officer to ensure things are progressing.
